training_data: TriView2CAD composite drawings, 9K train / 1K val (subset of 10K from coco_labels_10k.json), frozen ResNet-50 backbone
training_epochs: 2 epochs on 2K subset then 2 epochs on 10K (4 effective)
note: view class clears the >0.1 "real progress" threshold from the unblock notes. dimension_cluster still weak — labels are noisier. No ground truth for title_block / free_text in this dataset.
